name: PAROTID HEMANGIOMA

demographics.Frequency: 90% of parotid gland tumors during 1st year of life; M < F
demographics.Histo: capillary type >> cavernous type (in older children)

discriminating_features: well-defined mass with uniform intense enhancement
low to intermediate signal intensity on short TR
bright signal intensity on long TR
flow voids due to prominent vasculature

US: hypoechoic mass relative to parotid tissue
CT: well-defined mass with uniform intense enhancement
MR: low to intermediate signal intensity on short TR
bright signal intensity on long TR
flow voids due to prominent vasculature

clinical.Rx: surgery, sclerotherapy, laser ablation (therapy only with large size + encroachment on
